ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Booking #ABCD1234
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for booking with SkyFly Airlines. Below are the details of your upcoming trip:

• Passenger: Rahul Sharma
• Flight: SF123 from Mumbai (BOM) to Delhi (DEL)
• Date: 12th May 2026
• Departure: 09:45 AM from Terminal 3 (Gate A12)
• Arrival: 11:15 AM at Terminal 3 (Gate B5)
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Class: Economy

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. Keep this email handy for check‑in.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, reply to this email or call our customer support at +91-22-1234-5678.

Thank you for choosing SkyFly. We wish you a pleasant journey!

Best regards,

SkyFly Airlines Team

Dhanyavaad

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #12345 Overdue - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are writing to inform you that your QuickBooks invoice #12345 (amount INR 45,000) has remained unpaid for 30 days. As per our records, this payment is now overdue and will incur penalties if not settled within 5 business days.

To avoid further interest charges and to maintain uninterrupted access to your QuickBooks services, please verify your account details and complete the payment immediately by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you have already made the payment, kindly ignore this notice. Otherwise, failure to comply may result in suspension of your QuickBooks account.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

QuickBooks India Support

Sincerely,

Rajesh Kumar
Account Manager
